---
title: "Course schedule"
---

## Week 1

| block   	| start    	| end      	| subject                        	|
|---------	|----------	|----------	|--------------------------------	|
| May 11 	| 10:15 AM  	| 11:45 AM 	| [Getting familiar with scikit-learn](ipynb/1-Intro.ipynb) |
| May 12 	| 10:15 AM  	| 11:45 AM 	| Model selection and evaluation |
| May 13 	| 10:15 AM  	| 11:45 AM 	| Unsupervised learning |

## Week 2

| block   	| start    	| end      	| subject                        	|
|---------	|----------	|----------	|--------------------------------	|
| May 18 	| 10:15 AM  	| 11:45 AM 	| Trees and Ensemble Methods |
| May 19 	| To be defined  	| To be defined 	| Optimization and neural networks |
| May 20 	| To be defined  	| To be defined 	| Deep Learning with PyTorch |
